title: Campus Hackathon 2026
description: The biggest code sprint of the semester! Form a team, build a cool software project, and compete for exciting prizes. Mentors will be on site to assist.

schedule.title: Opening Ceremony
schedule.desc: Welcome address, rule overview, and API disclosures.

schedule.title: Hacking Begins
schedule.desc: Start coding and designing in teams of up to 4.

schedule.title: Lunch & Mentorship Hours
schedule.desc: Grab pizza and receive feedback from industry mentors.

schedule.title: Project Submission
schedule.desc: Upload links to github and submit devpost projects.

schedule.title: Presentations & Awards
schedule.desc: Top 5 teams present and winners are crowned.

title: Pixel Craft: UI/UX Workshop
description: Learn the principles of neobrutalist web design, typography, spacing, and micro-interactions in Figma. Perfect for developers who want to design better.

schedule.title: Introduction to Neobrutalism
schedule.desc: Key aesthetics and principles of modern high-contrast design.

schedule.title: Figma Sandbox Session
schedule.desc: Step-by-step layout of a mobile dashboard wireframe.

schedule.title: Interactive Feedback
schedule.desc: Live review of student designs and optimization tips.

title: Inter-Faculty Football Finals
description: The ultimate showdown between the Faculty of Engineering and Faculty of Business football clubs. Come support your peers under the floodlights!

schedule.title: Gates Open & Warmups
schedule.desc: Arrive early to get prime seats on the bleachers.

schedule.title: Halftime Show
schedule.desc: Cheerleading routines and field-goal challenge for spectators.

schedule.title: Trophy Presentation
schedule.desc: Celebrating the championship team and MVP.

title: BioTech Frontiers Symposium
description: Discover how computational algorithms and CRISPR technologies are redefining patient care and medical discoveries. Keynote lectures and panel discussion.

schedule.title: Keynote Lecture
schedule.desc: AI algorithms in protein folding research.

schedule.title: Panel: Ethical Bioengineering
schedule.desc: Discussing the ethics of CRISPR and gene modification.

schedule.title: Research Demos & Networking
schedule.desc: Meet poster presenters and view prototype biological sensors.
